summary: Iteration 10: New Page Flow Testing - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Verified complete new flow: Splash screen (no user) -> Auth -> Home page dashboard with stats + top 3 topics -> Full TrendingFeed via 'Browse All Topics'. All data-testids correctly implemented. HOME tab (renamed from TRENDING) returns to dashboard from all sub-views. Logout returns to splash screen.
passed_tests: Splash screen appears when no user is logged in (data-testid='splash-screen') - ✅
Splash screen has gradient background with floating animated emojis (🔥, 🤯, 😱, etc.)
Splash screen main card shows 'News just got unhinged.' with emoji reactions
Splash screen has mini topic tags (Markets crashed, AI update, No way)
Splash screen shows live counter '2,847 people catching up rn'
Splash screen CTA button (data-testid='splash-cta') with text 'WTF is happening? →'
CTA button navigates to auth screen - ✅
After login, user lands on Home page (data-testid='home-page') with dashboard - ✅
Home page shows 3 stat cards: '30 TOPICS TRENDING', '15.7k PEOPLE CONFUSED', '10.9k EXPLANATIONS READ'
Home page shows 'Hey there 👋' greeting with subtitle 'Here's what's blowing up right now'
Home page shows '🔥 Top 3 Right Now' section with 3 topic cards
Topic cards have data-testid='home-topic-{id}' format - ✅
Each topic card shows category icon, label, trend score, title, and 'Tap to read the explanation in 3 cards'
Home page has 'Browse All Topics' button (data-testid='browse-all-topics') - ✅
Clicking 'Browse All Topics' shows the full TrendingFeed (data-testid='trending-feed') - ✅
TrendingFeed has back button (data-testid='feed-back-btn') that returns to home dashboard - ✅
Bottom nav shows HOME/EXPLAIN/SAVED tabs (not TRENDING) - ✅
HOME tab has data-testid='nav-home' and shows 'HOME' label - ✅
Clicking HOME tab returns to home dashboard from TrendingFeed sub-view - ✅
Clicking HOME tab returns to home dashboard from EXPLAIN tab - ✅
Clicking HOME tab returns to home dashboard from SAVED tab - ✅
Clicking topic on home page opens explanation view with WHAT/WHY/YOU tabs - ✅
Logging out returns to splash screen (not auth directly) - ✅
Profile menu opens with data-testid='profile-menu' and has logout button data-testid='logout-btn'
Mobile (390x844): Splash screen renders correctly with responsive layout
Mobile: Home page renders with all elements (stats, topics, bottom nav)
Mobile: 3 stat cards visible and properly sized
Mobile: Bottom nav is visible and functional
critical_code_review_comments: SplashScreen.js: Uses framer-motion for smooth animations and transitions
SplashScreen.js: Floating emojis implemented with randomized positions and delays
SplashScreen.js: Live counter increments randomly every 4 seconds for engagement
SplashScreen.js: onContinue callback properly triggers view change to 'auth'
HomePage.js: Fetches real topics from API (personalized or general feed)
HomePage.js: Stats are derived from topic count (topics.length) with semi-random calculation
HomePage.js: Top 3 topics rendered with category styling and trend scores
HomePage.js: onTopicClick and onBrowseAll callbacks properly passed and handled
App.js: view state correctly manages: splash | auth | forgot | terms | onboarding | main | settings
App.js: showFeed sub-state controls whether home tab shows dashboard or full feed
App.js: handleTabChange resets showFeed to false, ensuring HOME always returns to dashboard
BottomNav.js: TABS array has 'home' key with label 'HOME' (renamed from TRENDING)
TrendingFeed.js: onBack prop correctly implemented with arrow-left button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified the new page flow implementation based on the reference site. Flow: Splash (when not logged in) -> Auth -> Home dashboard (stats + top 3 topics) -> Full feed (via Browse All). The showFeed state in App.js controls whether the home tab shows the dashboard or full TrendingFeed. HOME tab in bottom nav was renamed from TRENDING. All data-testids are correctly implemented. Logout returns to splash, not auth directly.
